---
title: "Process Images file"
format: html
editor: visual
---


```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(magick)

#Process images from imported dataset and convert them to pngs (all in vector_pics array)
pit_data <- read.csv("pit_scouting_2026.csv")

# taking links and converting them to images
pic_link <- pit_data$Upload.robot.photo
pics_link <- gsub("open\\?id=", "uc?export=download&id=", pic_link)
pit_data$Timestamp <- NULL
pit_data <- cbind("team#" = c(449,9732), pit_data)

colnames(pit_data) <- c("team_num","scout_initials", "weight", "length", "width", "height", "drive_base", "hopper_length","hopper_width", "hopper_height", "hopper_capacity", "robot_photo","turret", "current_issues", "battery_type", "num_batteries", "elec_quality","build_quality", "add_comments")

default_image <- image_read("default_image.png")
#convert to vector and apply image_read on every img in pics_link
vector_pics <- sapply(pics_link,image_read) 
vector_pics <- c(vector_pics, default_image)


write_pit_pics <- function(pit_data) { 
if (!dir.exists("robot_pics")) dir.create("robot_pics")
for (i in seq_along(vector_pics)) {
  path = paste0(pit_data$team_num[i], ".png")
  if (path == "NA.png") { 
    path = paste0("default_image",".png")
    print(path)
    next}
  else {
    image_write(
        vector_pics[[i]],
        path = path,
        format = "png")}
    print(path)
} 
}
write_pit_pics(pit_data)



```
